features.name: dff_output_feedback_to_mux_select_with_full_case
features.description: Code should include a feedback loop where a D flip-flop output signal drives the select line of a multiplexer that computes the flip-flop's next state value, combined with a full_case attribute on the multiplexer or case statement

features.name: fsm_onehot_output_via_shift_with_state_feedback
features.description: Code should include an FSM with one-hot encoded output using shift left operation, where the FSM state is computed via a feedback multiplexer controlled by the state register itself
